query:
SELECT id, name, address, neighborhood, categoryId, phone, hours, rating 
FROM establishments 
WHERE rating IS NULL AND (address NOT LIKE '%Brasil%' OR address IS NULL)
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, address, neighborhood, categoryId, phone, hours, rating 
FROM establishments 
WHERE rating IS NULL AND (address NOT LIKE '%Brasil%' OR address IS NULL)
ORDER BY id;
